name: 导数应用（单调性/极值/优化/切线）
subject: math
curriculum_points:
SL 1.1
Content
Operations with numbers in the form a×10 k where 1≤a<10 and k is an integer.
Guidance, clarification and syllabus links
Calculator or computer notation is not acceptable. For example, 5.2E30 is not acceptable and should be written as 5.2×1030.

Prior learning topics
Number and algebra
• Expression of numbers in the form a×10 k, 1≤a<10, k∈ℤ

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 导数与切线：拖动点观察切线斜率变化
GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「导数应用（单调性/极值/优化/切线）」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer:
应答扣课标要点：SL 1.1
Content
Operations with numbers in the form a×10 k where 1≤a<10 and k is an integer.
Guidance, clarification and …；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem:
用因果链解释：Prior learning topics
Number and algebra
• Expression of numbers in the form a×1… 对理解「导数应用（单调性/极值/优化/切线）」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
